scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @web-learn/shared build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @web-learn/frontend dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/registry dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/gateway dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/auth-service dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/topic-space-service dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/ai-service dev"
scripts.dev:services: pnpm --filter @web-learn/shared build && concurrently "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/registry dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/gateway dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/auth-service dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/topic-space-service dev" "cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env pnpm --filter @web-learn/ai-service dev"
scripts.build:services: pnpm --filter @web-learn/shared build && pnpm --filter @web-learn/registry build && pnpm --filter @web-learn/gateway build && pnpm --filter @web-learn/auth-service build && pnpm --filter @web-learn/topic-space-service build && pnpm --filter @web-learn/ai-service build
